keywords: dag cycle detection dfs white gray black back edge two color three state graph transitive closure
ironRules: DFS uses three states: WHITE (unvisited), GRAY (on current path), BLACK (complete) — not a single visited Set
Encountering a GRAY node during DFS = back edge = cycle detected; return cyclePath immediately
cyclePath must be populated when cycle detected — empty cyclePath with CYCLE_DETECTED verdict is invalid
